title: The 60-Day Clock That May Stop Trump's Iran War, And How He Could Ignore It
summary_full: Under the War Powers Resolution, also called the War Powers Act, an American president who has activated the armed forces without Congressional approval has 60 days to stand down.
summary_public: Under the War Powers Resolution, also called the War Powers Act, an American president who has activated the armed forces without Congressional approval has 60 days to stand down.
